contents:
(** * Path groupoids as wild categories *)

(** Every type is a wild (2,1)-category. *)

(** Not global instances for now *)

(** These are written so that they can be augmented with an existing wildcat structure. For instance, you may partially define a wildcat and ask for paths for the higher cells. *)

(** Any type is a graph with morphisms given by the identity type. *)

Definition isgraph_paths (A : Type) : IsGraph A
  := {| Hom := paths |}.
(** Any graph is a 2-graph with 2-cells given by the identity type. *)

Definition is2graph_paths (A : Type) `{IsGraph A} : Is2Graph A
  := fun _ _ => isgraph_paths _.
(** Any 2-graph is a 3-graph with 3-cells given by the identity type. *)

Definition is3graph_paths (A : Type) `{Is2Graph A} : Is3Graph A
  := fun _ _ => is2graph_paths _.
(** We assume these as instances for the rest of the file with a low priority. *)
Local Existing Instances isgraph_paths is2graph_paths is3graph_paths | 10.
(** Any type has composition and identity morphisms given by path concatenation and reflexivity. *)

Instance is01cat_paths (A : Type) : Is01Cat A
  := {| Id := @idpath _ ; cat_comp := fun _ _ _ x y => concat y x |}.
(** Any type has a 0-groupoid structure with inverse morphisms given by path inversion. *)

Instance is0gpd_paths (A : Type) : Is0Gpd A
  := { gpd_rev := @inverse _ }.
(** Postcomposition is a 0-functor when the 2-cells are paths. *)

goals.conclusion: Is0Functor (cat_postcomp a g)
Is0Functor (cat_postcomp a g)

forall a0 b0 : a $-> b,
(a0 $-> b0) -> cat_postcomp a g a0 $-> cat_postcomp a g b0

contents: (** Precomposition is a 0-functor when the 2-cells are paths. *)

goals.conclusion: Is0Functor (cat_precomp c f)
Is0Functor (cat_precomp c f)

forall a0 b0 : b $-> c,
(a0 $-> b0) -> cat_precomp c f a0 $-> cat_precomp c f b0

contents: (** Any type is a 1-category with n-morphisms given by paths. *)

goals.conclusion: Is1Cat A
Is1Cat A
forall a b : A, Is01Cat (a $-> b)
forall a b : A, Is0Gpd (a $-> b)
forall (a b c : A) (g : b $-> c), Is0Functor (cat_postcomp a g)
forall (a b c : A) (f : a $-> b), Is0Functor (cat_precomp c f)

forall (a b c d : A) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) (h : c $-> d),
h $o g $o f $== h $o (g $o f)

forall (a b c d : A) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) (h : c $-> d),
h $o (g $o f) $== h $o g $o f
forall (a b : A) (f : a $-> b), Id b $o f $== f
forall (a b : A) (f : a $-> b), f $o Id a $== f
forall a b : A, Is01Cat (a $-> b)
forall a b : A, Is0Gpd (a $-> b)
forall (a b c : A) (g : b $-> c), Is0Functor (cat_postcomp a g)
forall (a b c : A) (f : a $-> b), Is0Functor (cat_precomp c f)

forall (a b c d : A) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) (h : c $-> d),
h $o g $o f $== h $o (g $o f)

forall (a b c d : A) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) (h : c $-> d),
h $o (g $o f) $== h $o g $o f
forall (a b : A) (f : a $-> b), Id b $o f $== f
forall (a b : A) (f : a $-> b), f $o Id a $== f

contents: (** Any type is a 1-groupoid with morphisms given by paths. *)

goals.conclusion: Is1Gpd A
Is1Gpd A
forall (a b : A) (f : a $-> b), f^$ $o f $== Id a
forall (a b : A) (f : a $-> b), f $o f^$ $== Id b
forall (a b : A) (f : a $-> b), f^$ $o f $== Id a
forall (a b : A) (f : a $-> b), f $o f^$ $== Id b

contents: (** Any type is a 2-category with higher morphisms given by paths. *)

goals.conclusion: Is21Cat A
Is21Cat A
forall a b : A, Is1Cat (a $-> b)
forall a b : A, Is1Gpd (a $-> b)
forall (a b c : A) (g : b $-> c), Is1Functor (cat_postcomp a g)
forall (a b c : A) (f : a $-> b), Is1Functor (cat_precomp c f)

forall (a b c d : A) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
Is1Natural (cat_precomp d f o cat_precomp d g) (cat_precomp d (g $o f))
  (cat_assoc f g)

forall (a b c d : A) (f : a $-> b) (h : c $-> d),
Is1Natural (cat_precomp d f o cat_postcomp b h)
  (cat_postcomp a h o cat_precomp c f) (fun g : b $-> c => cat_assoc f g h)

forall (a b c d : A) (g : b $-> c) (h : c $-> d),
Is1Natural (cat_postcomp a (h $o g)) (cat_postcomp a h o cat_postcomp a g)
  (fun f : a $-> b => cat_assoc f g h)
forall a b : A, Is1Natural (cat_postcomp a (Id b)) idmap cat_idl
forall a b : A, Is1Natural (cat_precomp b (Id a)) idmap cat_idr

forall (a b c d e : A) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) 
(h : c $-> d) (k : d $-> e),
k $@L cat_assoc f g h $o cat_assoc f (h $o g) k $o cat_assoc g h k $@R f $==
cat_assoc (g $o f) h k $o cat_assoc f g (k $o h)

forall (a b c : A) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
g $@L cat_idl f $o cat_assoc f (Id b) g $== cat_idr g $@R f
forall a b : A, Is1Cat (a $-> b)
forall a b : A, Is1Gpd (a $-> b)
forall (a b c : A) (g : b $-> c), Is1Functor (cat_postcomp a g)
Is1Functor (cat_postcomp x p)

forall (a b : x $-> y) (f g : a $-> b),
f $== g -> fmap (cat_postcomp x p) f $== fmap (cat_postcomp x p) g

forall a : x $-> y,
fmap (cat_postcomp x p) (Id a) $== Id (cat_postcomp x p a)

forall (a b c : x $-> y) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap (cat_postcomp x p) (g $o f) $==
fmap (cat_postcomp x p) g $o fmap (cat_postcomp x p) f

forall (a b : x $-> y) (f g : a $-> b),
f $== g -> fmap (cat_postcomp x p) f $== fmap (cat_postcomp x p) g
q $== r -> fmap (cat_postcomp x p) q $== fmap (cat_postcomp x p) r

forall a : x $-> y,
fmap (cat_postcomp x p) (Id a) $== Id (cat_postcomp x p a)

forall (a b c : x $-> y) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap (cat_postcomp x p) (g $o f) $==
fmap (cat_postcomp x p) g $o fmap (cat_postcomp x p) f

forall (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap (cat_postcomp x p) (g $o f) $==
fmap (cat_postcomp x p) g $o fmap (cat_postcomp x p) f
forall (a b c : A) (f : a $-> b), Is1Functor (cat_precomp c f)
Is1Functor (cat_precomp z p)

forall (a b : y $-> z) (f g : a $-> b),
f $== g -> fmap (cat_precomp z p) f $== fmap (cat_precomp z p) g
forall a : y $-> z, fmap (cat_precomp z p) (Id a) $== Id (cat_precomp z p a)

forall (a b c : y $-> z) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap (cat_precomp z p) (g $o f) $==
fmap (cat_precomp z p) g $o fmap (cat_precomp z p) f

forall (a b : y $-> z) (f g : a $-> b),
f $== g -> fmap (cat_precomp z p) f $== fmap (cat_precomp z p) g
q $== r -> fmap (cat_precomp z p) q $== fmap (cat_precomp z p) r
forall a : y $-> z, fmap (cat_precomp z p) (Id a) $== Id (cat_precomp z p a)

forall (a b c : y $-> z) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap (cat_precomp z p) (g $o f) $==
fmap (cat_precomp z p) g $o fmap (cat_precomp z p) f

forall (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap (cat_precomp z p) (g $o f) $==
fmap (cat_precomp z p) g $o fmap (cat_precomp z p) f

contents: intros a b c q r s t h g.
exact (concat_whisker q r s t h g)^.

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b c d : A) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
Is1Natural (cat_precomp d f o cat_precomp d g) (cat_precomp d (g $o f))
  (cat_assoc f g)

contents: intros a b c d q r.

goals.conclusion:
Is1Natural (cat_precomp d q o cat_precomp d r) (cat_precomp d (r $o q))
  (cat_assoc q r)

forall (a0 a' : c $-> d) (f : a0 $-> a'),
cat_assoc q r a' $o fmap (cat_precomp d q o cat_precomp d r) f $==
fmap (cat_precomp d (r $o q)) f $o cat_assoc q r a0

cat_assoc q r t $o fmap (cat_precomp d q o cat_precomp d r) h $==
fmap (cat_precomp d (r $o q)) h $o cat_assoc q r s

forall (a b c d : A) (f : a $-> b) (h : c $-> d),
Is1Natural (cat_precomp d f o cat_postcomp b h)
  (cat_postcomp a h o cat_precomp c f) (fun g : b $-> c => cat_assoc f g h)

contents: intros a b c d q r.

goals.conclusion:
Is1Natural (cat_precomp d q o cat_postcomp b r)
  (cat_postcomp a r o cat_precomp c q) (fun g : b $-> c => cat_assoc q g r)

forall (a0 a' : b $-> c) (f : a0 $-> a'),
(fun g : b $-> c => cat_assoc q g r) a' $o
fmap (cat_precomp d q o cat_postcomp b r) f $==
fmap (cat_postcomp a r o cat_precomp c q) f $o
(fun g : b $-> c => cat_assoc q g r) a0

(fun g : b $-> c => cat_assoc q g r) t $o
fmap (cat_precomp d q o cat_postcomp b r) h $==
fmap (cat_postcomp a r o cat_precomp c q) h $o
(fun g : b $-> c => cat_assoc q g r) s

forall (a b c d : A) (g : b $-> c) (h : c $-> d),
Is1Natural (cat_postcomp a (h $o g)) (cat_postcomp a h o cat_postcomp a g)
  (fun f : a $-> b => cat_assoc f g h)

contents: intros a b c d q r.

goals.conclusion:
Is1Natural (cat_postcomp a (r $o q)) (cat_postcomp a r o cat_postcomp a q)
  (fun f : a $-> b => cat_assoc f q r)

forall (a0 a' : a $-> b) (f : a0 $-> a'),
(fun f0 : a $-> b => cat_assoc f0 q r) a' $o fmap (cat_postcomp a (r $o q)) f $==
fmap (cat_postcomp a r o cat_postcomp a q) f $o
(fun f0 : a $-> b => cat_assoc f0 q r) a0

(fun f : a $-> b => cat_assoc f q r) t $o fmap (cat_postcomp a (r $o q)) h $==
fmap (cat_postcomp a r o cat_postcomp a q) h $o
(fun f : a $-> b => cat_assoc f q r) s
forall a b : A, Is1Natural (cat_postcomp a (Id b)) idmap cat_idl
Is1Natural (cat_postcomp a (Id b)) idmap cat_idl

forall (a0 a' : a $-> b) (f : a0 $-> a'),
cat_idl a' $o fmap (cat_postcomp a (Id b)) f $== fmap idmap f $o cat_idl a0
ap (fun y : a = b => y @ 1) h @ concat_p1 q = concat_p1 p @ h
(concat_p1 p)^ @ (ap (fun y : a = b => y @ 1) h @ concat_p1 q) = h
((concat_p1 p)^ @ ap (fun y : a = b => y @ 1) h) @ concat_p1 q = h
forall a b : A, Is1Natural (cat_precomp b (Id a)) idmap cat_idr
Is1Natural (cat_precomp b (Id a)) idmap cat_idr

forall (a0 a' : a $-> b) (f : a0 $-> a'),
cat_idr a' $o fmap (cat_precomp b (Id a)) f $== fmap idmap f $o cat_idr a0
cat_idr q $o fmap (cat_precomp b (Id a)) h $== fmap idmap h $o cat_idr p
(cat_idr p)^ @ (cat_idr q $o fmap (cat_precomp b (Id a)) h) = fmap idmap h
((cat_idr p)^ @ fmap (cat_precomp b (Id a)) h) @ cat_idr q = fmap idmap h

forall (a b c d e : A) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) 
(h : c $-> d) (k : d $-> e),
k $@L cat_assoc f g h $o cat_assoc f (h $o g) k $o cat_assoc g h k $@R f $==
cat_assoc (g $o f) h k $o cat_assoc f g (k $o h)

contents: intros a b c d e p q r s.

goals.conclusion:
s $@L cat_assoc p q r $o cat_assoc p (r $o q) s $o cat_assoc q r s $@R p $==
cat_assoc (q $o p) r s $o cat_assoc p q (s $o r)

((cat_assoc q r s $@R p) @ cat_assoc p (r $o q) s) @ (s $@L cat_assoc p q r) =
cat_assoc (q $o p) r s $o cat_assoc p q (s $o r)

forall (a b c : A) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
g $@L cat_idl f $o cat_assoc f (Id b) g $== cat_idr g $@R f

contents: intros a b c p q.

goals.conclusion: q $@L cat_idl p $o cat_assoc p (Id b) q $== cat_idr q $@R p
